export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor and exporting all its annotations to an XFDF file using a file stream.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Memory Stream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to export selected annotation types from specific PDF pages into an XFDF format using a memory stream for further processing.

update-annotation-modified-date.title: Update Annotation Modified Date in PDF
update-annotation-modified-date.description: Shows how to create a PDF in memory, add a TextAnnotation, set its Modified property to DateTime.Now, and apply the change with PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

delete-annotation-with-error-handling.title: Delete Annotation with Error Handling in PDF
delete-annotation-with-error-handling.description: Demonstrates how to delete a specific annotation from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and gracefully handle the case where the annotation does not exist.

set-all-annotation-open-flags.title: Set All Annotation Open Flags to True
set-all-annotation-open-flags.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through each page and its annotations, and setting the Open property of TextAnnotation and PopupAnnotation to true before saving the document.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Creates a PDF with two text annotations, uses PdfAnnotationEditor.DeleteAnnotations to delete them, and validates the removal with a unit test.

delete-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Delete All Annotations from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor
delete-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF to the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, remove every annotation, and save the cleaned document to a new file.

batch-remove-pdf-annotations-summary.title: Batch Remove Annotations from PDFs and Generate Summary Report
batch-remove-pdf-annotations-summary.description: The example iterates through PDF files in a folder, counts and deletes all annotations using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor, saves the cleaned PDFs, and prints a summary of removed annotations per file.

flatten-pdf-annotations-log-size-reducti.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Log Size Reduction
flatten-pdf-annotations-log-size-reducti.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then record and display the original and reduced file sizes for audit purposes.

diagnostic-annotation-workflow.title: Diagnostic Annotation Workflow with Verbose Logging
diagnostic-annotation-workflow.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade to log each step of an annotation manipulation workflow, including loading, exporting, deleting, and saving a PDF.

extract-pdf-annotations-to-json-log.title: Extract PDF Annotations and Write to JSON Audit Log
extract-pdf-annotations-to-json-log.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts all annotations using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, gathers key properties, serializes them to JSON, and writes the result to an audit log file.

list-annotation-names-pdf.title: List Annotation Names in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor
list-annotation-names-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, extract all annotations, and write each annotation's Name to the console for debugging.

flatten-pdf-annotations-verify-removal.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
flatten-pdf-annotations-verify-removal.description: The example flattens all annotations in a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then iterates through each page to confirm that no annotation objects remain.

benchmark-deleteannotations-vs-deleteann.title: Benchmark DeleteAnnotations vs DeleteAnnotation
benchmark-deleteannotations-vs-deleteann.description: Shows how to measure and compare the performance of deleting all annotations at once with DeleteAnnotations() versus removing a single annotation with DeleteAnnotation(string) using Aspose.Pdf.

export-highlight-annotations-to-xfdf.title: Export Highlight Annotations to XFDF
export-highlight-annotations-to-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to filter only Highlight annotations from a PDF and export them to an XFDF file using the PdfAnnotationEditor overload that accepts page range and annotation types.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, import annotations from an XFDF file, and save the updated document.

import-xfdf-annotations-to-selected-page.title: Import XFDF Annotations onto Selected PDF Pages
import-xfdf-annotations-to-selected-page.description: Exports annotations from a source PDF for a specified page range into a temporary XFDF file and then imports those annotations into a target PDF, showing how to transfer page‑specific annotations using Aspose.Pdf.

set-readonly-flag-on-pdf-annotations.title: Set Read‑Only Flag on PDF Annotations
set-readonly-flag-on-pdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to apply the ReadOnly annotation flag using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade and save the updated PDF.

batch-update-annotation-author.title: Batch Update Annotation Author in Multiple PDFs
batch-update-annotation-author.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a directory and use PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotationsAuthor to replace the author of all annotations, saving the modified PDFs to an output folder.

modify-pdf-annotation-authors-retry.title: Modify PDF Annotation Authors with Retry and Exponential Backoff
modify-pdf-annotation-authors-retry.description: Demonstrates using PdfAnnotationEditor to change annotation authors in a PDF and applying an exponential backoff retry policy for transient I/O errors.

delete-pdf-annotations-by-color.title: Delete PDF Annotations by Color
delete-pdf-annotations-by-color.description: Shows how to remove annotations from a PDF whose Color property matches a specific RGB value using the Aspose.Pdf facade API.

merge-multiple-xfdf-files-into-pdf.title: Merge Multiple XFDF Files and Import into PDF
merge-multiple-xfdf-files-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to combine several XFDF annotation/field files into a single XFDF stream and then import the merged data into an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-annotations-by-author.title: Delete Annotations by Author Using PdfAnnotationEditor
delete-annotations-by-author.description: Shows how to filter and remove PDF annotations whose author (Title) matches a specific name by using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v3.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF Using MemoryStream
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf__v3.description: Shows how to bind a PDF from a byte array, export all its annotations to XFDF, and obtain the XFDF data as a byte array using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

flatten-pdfs-to-custom-output-directory.title: Flatten PDFs and Save to Custom Output Directory
flatten-pdfs-to-custom-output-directory.description: Demonstrates how to flatten form fields in PDF files and write the flattened PDFs to a user‑specified output folder using Aspose.Pdf.

log-pdf-annotation-deletions.title: Log PDF Annotation Deletions
log-pdf-annotation-deletions.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through all PDF pages, collect annotation details, log each deletion (name, type, page) to a file, and remove the annotations using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-text-annotations-export-xfdf.title: Delete Text Annotations and Export Remaining to XFDF
delete-text-annotations-export-xfdf.description: Shows how to remove all annotations of a specific type (e.g., Text) from a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then export the remaining annotations to an XFDF file.

export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.title: Export and Import PDF Annotations via XFDF
export-import-pdf-annotations-xfdf.description: Shows how to export all annotations from a source PDF to an XFDF file and then import that XFDF into another PDF to duplicate the annotation layout.

prevent-flattening-of-signed-pdfs.title: Prevent Flattening of Signed PDFs
prevent-flattening-of-signed-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to detect digital signatures in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature and conditionally flatten the document only when no signatures are present, preserving signature validity.

delete-pdf-annotations-with-retry.title: Delete PDF Annotations with Retry Mechanism
delete-pdf-annotations-with-retry.description: Demonstrates how to remove all annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor and implement a retry loop that rebinds the document if the first attempt fails.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to PdfAnnotationEditor, delete every annotation, and save the cleaned document using streams.

delete-annotations-from-pdf-using-config.title: Delete Specific Annotation Types from PDF Using Configuration
delete-annotations-from-pdf-using-config.description: Shows how to generate a JSON config of annotation types, load it, and remove those annotations from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

batch-export-delete-pdf-annotations-xfdf.title: Batch Export and Delete PDF Annotations with XFDF Archiving
batch-export-delete-pdf-annotations-xfdf.description: Demonstrates iterating over PDF files, exporting all annotations to XFDF using PdfAnnotationEditor, deleting the annotations from the PDFs, and moving the XFDF files to an archive folder.

delete-text-annotations-from-pdf.title: Delete Text Annotations from PDF
delete-text-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove only text (sticky note) annotations from a PDF by using PdfAnnotationEditor.DeleteAnnotations with the type name "Text".

add-custom-annotation-with-flags.title: Add Custom Annotation with Flags to PDF
add-custom-annotation-with-flags.description: Demonstrates creating a TextAnnotation, setting custom annotation flags, and applying it to a PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations.

flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Flatten PDF Annotations to Non‑Editable Visual Elements
flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations in a PDF, converting them into static visual content and saving the result.

annotation-summary-report.title: Generate Annotation Summary Report for PDFs
annotation-summary-report.description: Shows how to load PDF files, extract all annotations with PdfAnnotationEditor, count them by type, and print a summary for each document.

import-xfdf-data-and-cleanup-temp-file.title: Import XFDF Data into PDF and Delete Temporary File
import-xfdf-data-and-cleanup-temp-file.description: Demonstrates how to import XFDF form data into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, save the updated document, and delete the temporary XFDF file after a successful operation.

async-pdf-annotation-operations.title: Asynchronous PDF Annotation Operations
async-pdf-annotation-operations.description: Demonstrates how to perform common PDF annotation tasks (flatten, delete, import, export) asynchronously by wrapping Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor calls in Task.Run.

clone-modify-text-annotation.title: Clone and Modify a Text Annotation in PDF
clone-modify-text-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to clone the first TextAnnotation on a PDF page, change its properties such as title, contents and color, and add the cloned annotation back to the same page using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-and-flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Delete and Flatten PDF Annotations
delete-and-flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to remove all annotations from a PDF, flatten any remaining ones, and save the cleaned document.

batch-delete-stamp-annotations.title: Batch Delete Stamp Annotations from PDFs
batch-delete-stamp-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a directory and remove all stamp annotations using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

pdf-annotation-helper-delete-flatten-xfd.title: PDF Annotation Helper for Deleting, Flattening and XFDF Operations
pdf-annotation-helper-delete-flatten-xfd.description: Shows a static helper class that uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to bind a PDF, delete or flatten annotations (optionally by type or page range), and export or import annotations via XFDF streams.

remove-link-annotations-pdf-pages-3-7.title: Delete Link Annotations from PDF Pages 3‑7
remove-link-annotations-pdf-pages-3-7.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, delete link annotations (intended for pages 3 through 7), and save the modified document.

delete-specific-annotation.title: Delete a Specific Annotation from a PDF
delete-specific-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF, remove an annotation identified by its name, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-delete-pdf-annotations-progress-ba.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations with Progress Bar
batch-delete-pdf-annotations-progress-ba.description: Demonstrates iterating over PDFs in a folder, removing all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, saving the cleaned files, and showing a console progress bar indicating the processing percentage.

flatten-annotations-first-five-pages.title: Flatten Annotations on First Five PDF Pages
flatten-annotations-first-five-pages.description: Shows how to use PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations on pages 1‑5 of a PDF document and save the result.

modify-annotation-author-on-pdf-page.title: Modify Annotation Author on Specific PDF Page
modify-annotation-author-on-pdf-page.description: Shows how to change the author of annotations on a given PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor.

flatten-annotations-in-pdfs-on-network-s.title: Flatten Annotations in PDFs on a Network Share
flatten-annotations-in-pdfs-on-network-s.description: Shows how to enumerate PDF files in a network folder and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten all annotations, overwriting each original file.

delete-pdf-annotation-by-name.title: Delete PDF Annotation by Name
delete-pdf-annotation-by-name.description: Shows how to remove a specific annotation from a PDF document by passing its name to the DeleteAnnotation method of PdfAnnotationEditor.

validate-exported-xfdf-against-schema.title: Validate Exported XFDF Against Schema
validate-exported-xfdf-against-schema.description: Exports PDF annotations or form fields to an XFDF file using the Form facade and then validates the generated XFDF against the official XFDF XSD schema.

delete-all-annotations-verify-count.title: Delete All Annotations and Verify Count
delete-all-annotations-verify-count.description: The example loads a PDF, counts existing annotations, removes all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, saves the result, and then recounts to confirm that no annotations remain.

batch-import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdfs.title: Batch Import XFDF Annotations into PDFs
batch-import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdfs.description: Shows how to scan a folder for PDF files, locate matching XFDF files by name, import the annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor, and save the updated PDFs to an output directory.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.title: Import XFDF Annotations into Multiple PDFs
import-xfdf-annotations-into-multiple-pd.description: Shows how to import a single XFDF file containing reviewer comments into several PDF documents, creating new PDFs that include the same annotations.

extract-annotation-rectangles-to-pdf.title: Extract Annotation Rectangles and Visualize as PDF Pages
extract-annotation-rectangles-to-pdf.description: Reads a source PDF, extracts the rectangle of each annotation, and creates a new PDF where each page visualizes one annotation rectangle in red for easy inspection.

modify-pdf-annotation-subject-color.title: Modify PDF Annotation Subject and Color
modify-pdf-annotation-subject-color.description: Demonstrates how to change the subject and color of a specific PDF annotation by creating a new TextAnnotation and applying it with the PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations method.

add-custom-metadata-to-pdf-annotation.title: Add Custom Metadata to PDF Annotation
add-custom-metadata-to-pdf-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a text annotation to a PDF page and embed custom metadata by storing a JSON string in the annotation's Subject property using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

log-annotation-modification-timestamps.title: Log Annotation Modification Timestamps in PDF
log-annotation-modification-timestamps.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with PdfAnnotationEditor, iterate through all annotations, update their Modified timestamp, and save the changes. Useful for tracking when each annotation was last edited.

batch-flatten-pdf-annotations-cancellati.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations with Cancellation Support
batch-flatten-pdf-annotations-cancellati.description: Demonstrates how to process a batch of PDF files, flatten their annotations using Aspose.Pdf, and support user‑initiated cancellation via a CancellationToken.

export-pdf-annotations-to-pretty-xfdf.title: Export PDF Annotations to Pretty‑Printed XFDF
export-pdf-annotations-to-pretty-xfdf.description: Demonstrates how to export annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and format the XML with indentation for easier manual editing.

delete-annotations-from-pdfs-in-parallel.title: Delete All Annotations from PDFs in Parallel
delete-annotations-from-pdfs-in-parallel.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor together with Parallel.ForEach to remove all annotations from a batch of PDF files concurrently while preserving the original folder structure.

backup-pdf-and-flatten-form-fields.title: Backup PDF and Flatten Form Fields
backup-pdf-and-flatten-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to create a backup of a PDF before flattening its form fields using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then saves the flattened document to a new file.

modify-pdf-annotation-subject.title: Modify PDF Annotation Subject Using PdfAnnotationEditor
modify-pdf-annotation-subject.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a text annotation, then using PdfAnnotationEditor.ModifyAnnotations to update the annotation's Subject property and verifying the change in a unit test.

get-annotation-count-per-pdf-page.title: Get Annotation Count Per PDF Page
get-annotation-count-per-pdf-page.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and count the annotations on each page, returning a dictionary of page numbers to counts.

extract-pdf-annotation-details.title: Extract PDF Annotation Details into Custom DTO
extract-pdf-annotation-details.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to iterate through a PDF, read each annotation's name, type, and rectangle, and store the information in a custom C# object.

measure-flatten-annotations-performance.title: Measure Flatten Annotations Performance on PDF
measure-flatten-annotations-performance.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and measures the time taken to assess performance impact.

flatten-pdf-add-custom-metadata.title: Flatten PDF and Tag with Custom Metadata
flatten-pdf-add-custom-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to flatten a PDF (remove interactive form fields while preserving appearance) and then add a custom metadata entry that records the flattening date.

flatten-pdf-annotations-verbose.title: Flatten PDF Annotations with Optional Verbose Logging
flatten-pdf-annotations-verbose.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to bind a PDF, flatten all its annotations, and save the result, with a command‑line flag for verbose logging.

remove-old-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove Old Annotations from PDF
remove-old-annotations-from-pdf.description: Shows how to batch‑remove PDF annotations that are older than a specified number of days using Aspose.Pdf's annotation editor.

export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.title: Export PDF Annotations with Page Numbers to CSV
export-pdf-annotations-to-csv.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's annotations, retrieve a readable name, and write the page number and annotation name to a CSV file.

flatten-pdf-annotations-log-file-sizes.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Log File Sizes
flatten-pdf-annotations-log-file-sizes.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor and log the original and flattened file sizes for audit tracking.

export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-with-cust.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF with Custom Namespace
export-pdf-annotations-to-xfdf-with-cust.description: Demonstrates how to export all annotations from a PDF to an XFDF file and replace the default XFDF namespace with a custom one using Aspose.Pdf.

copy-annotations-to-multiple-pdfs.title: Copy Annotations from Template PDF to Multiple PDFs
copy-annotations-to-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to export annotations from a template PDF to an XFDF stream and import them into several target PDFs, saving each annotated document.

get-annotation-names-by-author.title: Get Annotation Names by Author from PDF
get-annotation-names-by-author.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through pages and annotations, and return the names of markup annotations whose Title matches a given author.

rename-pdf-annotation-names-prefix.title: Rename PDF Annotation Names with Standard Prefix
rename-pdf-annotation-names-prefix.description: Shows how to batch rename annotation names in a PDF by adding a standardized prefix using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor facade.

backup-pdf-and-delete-annotations.title: Backup Original PDF and Delete Annotations
backup-pdf-and-delete-annotations.description: Creates a backup of the source PDF, then removes all annotations using PdfAnnotationEditor and saves the modified document.

count-pdf-annotation-types.title: Count PDF Annotation Types
count-pdf-annotation-types.description: Shows how to load a PDF, extract all annotations with PdfAnnotationEditor, and return a dictionary mapping each AnnotationType to its occurrence count.

pdf-annotation-utility-delete-flatten-ex.title: PDF Annotation Utility: Delete, Flatten, Export
pdf-annotation-utility-delete-flatten-ex.description: Demonstrates a command‑line tool that uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades to delete specific pages, flatten annotations, and export annotations to an XFDF file.

flatten-pdf-annotations-preserve-appeara.title: Flatten PDF Annotations While Preserving Appearance
flatten-pdf-annotations-preserve-appeara.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, flattening all annotations into static graphics while keeping their visual appearance, and saving the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

export-pdf-annotations-form-fields-xfdf-.title: Export PDF Annotations and Form Fields to XFDF with Diagnostic Logging
export-pdf-annotations-form-fields-xfdf-.description: Demonstrates exporting PDF annotations and form field data to XFDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and writing the generated XFDF content to a diagnostic log file for troubleshooting.

batch-delete-pdf-annotations-by-type.title: Batch Delete PDF Annotations While Retaining Specified Types
batch-delete-pdf-annotations-by-type.description: Shows how to load a JSON configuration that lists annotation types to keep, iterate through each page of a PDF, and delete all other annotations using Aspose.Pdf.

skip-flatten-readonly-annotations-batch.title: Skip Flattening Read‑Only Annotations During Batch PDF Processing
skip-flatten-readonly-annotations-batch.description: Demonstrates batch processing of PDF files, iterating through pages and annotations, and conditionally flattening them while skipping annotations marked as read‑only based on a configuration flag.

merge-annotation-layers.title: Merge Annotation Layers from Multiple PDFs
merge-annotation-layers.description: Shows how to import annotation layers from several source PDFs into a base PDF and save the combined result using Aspose.Pdf's PdfAnnotationEditor.

compile-pdf-annotations-summary.title: Compile PDF Text Annotations into a Summary Document
compile-pdf-annotations-summary.description: Demonstrates how to extract text (comment) annotations from an existing PDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and generate a new PDF that lists each annotation with its page number.

delete-pdf-annotations-by-name.title: Delete PDF Annotations by Name (Literal and Variable)
delete-pdf-annotations-by-name.description: Demonstrates removing a specific annotation from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by supplying its name as a string literal or via a variable.

monitor-folder-flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Monitor Folder and Flatten PDF Annotations
monitor-folder-flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Demonstrates a background service that watches a directory for new PDF files and uses Aspose.Pdf to flatten all annotations, saving the result with a suffix.

test-export-annotations-unbound-editor.title: Test ExportAnnotationsXfdf Throws Exception on Unbound PdfAnnotationEditor
test-export-annotations-unbound-editor.description: Demonstrates how ExportAnnotationsXfdf raises an exception when called on a PdfAnnotationEditor that hasn't been bound to a PDF document.

delete-all-annotations-from-pdfs.title: Delete All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
delete-all-annotations-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to bind each PDF file in a directory, remove all annotations with PdfAnnotationEditor, and overwrite the original files.

export-annotations-empty-xfdf.title: Export Annotations Generates Empty XFDF When No Annotations
export-annotations-empty-xfdf.description: Shows how to use PdfAnnotationEditor to export PDF annotations to XFDF and verify that a PDF without annotations produces a valid, empty XFDF document.

clone-recolor-annotation-to-another-page.title: Clone and Recolor PDF Annotation to Another Page
clone-recolor-annotation-to-another-page.description: Shows how to clone an existing annotation, change its color, and add the cloned annotation to a different page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

import-annotations-preserve-existing.title: Import Annotations While Preserving Existing Ones
import-annotations-preserve-existing.description: Demonstrates how to import annotations from multiple source PDFs into a target PDF without removing the annotations that already exist in the target document.

import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.title: Import XFDF Annotations into PDF from Streams
import-xfdf-annotations-into-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF and an XFDF file as streams, bind the PDF to PdfAnnotationEditor, import annotations from the XFDF stream, and save the updated PDF without using temporary files.

batch-flatten-pdf-annotations.title: Batch Flatten PDF Annotations in a Folder
batch-flatten-pdf-annotations.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a directory and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to flatten their annotations, saving the results with a "_flattened" suffix.

log-annotation-operation-durations.title: Log Annotation Operation Durations in PDF
log-annotation-operation-durations.description: Demonstrates how to add, modify, and delete a text annotation in a PDF while measuring each operation's execution time using Stopwatch for performance logging.

health-check-pdfannotationeditor-bind.title: Health Check: Bind PdfAnnotationEditor to PDF
health-check-pdfannotationeditor-bind.description: Demonstrates a simple health check that loads a PDF and binds it to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to verify that the binding succeeds without errors.

validate-pdf-integrity-after-annotations.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Adding Annotations
validate-pdf-integrity-after-annotations.description: Shows how to add a text annotation to a PDF, save the modified file, and validate its integrity by detecting corrupted objects using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v3.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v3.description: Shows how to load a PDF, delete every annotation using the PdfAnnotationEditor facade, and save the cleaned file.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdfs.title: Remove All Annotations from PDFs in a Folder
remove-all-annotations-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to delete every annotation from each PDF file in a given directory and save the cleaned documents.

flatten-pdf-annotations-verify.title: Flatten PDF Annotations and Verify Removal
flatten-pdf-annotations-verify.description: Demonstrates how to flatten all annotations in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then scans each page to ensure no annotation objects remain.

batch-delete-annotations-azure-blob.title: Batch Delete Annotations from PDFs in Azure Blob Storage
batch-delete-annotations-azure-blob.description: Demonstrates how to stream PDF blobs from Azure Blob Storage, use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to delete all annotations, and upload the processed PDFs back to a target container.

export-annotations-to-xfdf-gzip.title: Export PDF Annotations to XFDF and Compress with GZip
export-annotations-to-xfdf-gzip.description: Shows how to export all annotations from a PDF to XFDF using PdfAnnotationEditor and then compress the XFDF output with GZip for efficient storage.

concurrent-delete-import-annotations.title: Concurrent Delete Pages and Import Annotations in PDF
concurrent-delete-import-annotations.description: Demonstrates running page deletion and annotation import on the same PDF simultaneously using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to verify thread safety.

check-duplicate-annotation-names.title: Check Duplicate Annotation Names in PDF
check-duplicate-annotation-names.description: Shows how to traverse all pages and annotations in a PDF, collect annotation names, and log any duplicates with the pages they appear on.

flatten-pdf-annotations-from-stream.title: Flatten PDF Annotations from Stream
flatten-pdf-annotations-from-stream.description: Shows how to flatten all annotations in a PDF provided as a stream and return the modified PDF as a MemoryStream, avoiding any file system access.

extract-group-annotations-by-author.title: Extract and Group PDF Annotations by Author
extract-group-annotations-by-author.description: Demonstrates how to extract all annotations from a PDF, group them by the author (Title property) and print a concise report.

pdf-annotation-helper-wrapper.title: PDF Annotation Helper Wrapper for Common Tasks
pdf-annotation-helper-wrapper.description: Shows a wrapper class that abstracts Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfAnnotationEditor to perform common annotation operations such as delete, flatten, export, import, redact, and modify annotation metadata.
